{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191355F85CA29818C941965706"}"},"total":3027},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7062158887164298015","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很不错，作者对于人的性格描写特别好。同时，主角在一系列事件中的成长以及各种事件中的悬疑点伏笔把握的很好。有一种跌宕起伏的感觉，是我在2022年中看到的第一本高质量小说。不过，希望作者能够在后续把坑填上，并且做到不烂尾。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1644287003,"group_id":"7054053281772866575","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7n+BqNIu95QPNYdq3TbARo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7c038e746c19424e9fa3d797edfd1e1d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789266&x-signature=N%2FM5fBjGTpZhYIaHU6Vp50EIUYE%3D","user_id":"54967845499","user_name":"十二品混沌青莲-王枫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"54967845499","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1651413276,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7054053281772866575","book_info":{"abstract":"（又名：规则类怪谈，从万圣节开始）
我叫白泽，一名普普通通的高二学生。
明明今天是万圣节，我却在小区里看到圣诞树，后来我才知道，那颗圣诞树并不存在。
业主群的十五条规则、隔壁的胆小大姐姐、奇怪的白发萝莉、巡逻队诡异的条例、我的校花同桌、大雾里的鬼…
小区、学校…在一件又一件诡异中，我不再是人，我成了恶魔。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b2ae59add66d7411ca42be0e3c059669~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"空之恋","author_id":"","book_id":"7054053281772866575","book_name":"开局陷入规则怪谈，我成了恶魔","book_short_name":"万圣节与规则","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1206人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7054054710885483047","read_count":"1206","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"651736"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"287","tags":"悬疑脑洞,灵异,规则怪谈","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5d34f2ed091337ad5251ca1a04e26a35~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448435&x-signature=kbzJScDvkVzE%2F1WTp8%2Bn6%2B64h%2FI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3272567517354815","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.950082e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191355F85CA29818C941965706"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5950,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1270},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7059930880940458766","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我
